svg.title: Amazon Elastic Beanstalk architecture
svg.desc: Developer deploys code to Elastic Beanstalk, which manages an Application Load Balancer, Auto Scaling Group with EC2 instances, and RDS database inside a VPC

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I deploy my code to Elastic Beanstalk?')
sendPrompt('What does the Application Load Balancer do in Elastic Beanstalk?')
sendPrompt('How does Elastic Beanstalk configure EC2 instances?')
sendPrompt('Can Elastic Beanstalk run multiple EC2 instances?')
sendPrompt('What happens when traffic spikes in Elastic Beanstalk?')
sendPrompt('How many EC2 instances can Elastic Beanstalk scale to?')
sendPrompt('How do I connect a database to Elastic Beanstalk?')
sendPrompt('How does Elastic Beanstalk monitor my application health?')
sendPrompt('Why does Elastic Beanstalk use S3?')
sendPrompt('How does Elastic Beanstalk expose my app to the internet?')
